_comment: Reference copy of ~/.claude/settings.json — DO NOT symlink this file. cc-dotfiles merges into the real settings.json, so it must remain a regular file. Use this as a guide for what to configure.

hooks._comment_hooks: Most hooks are installed by cc-dotfiles. The two CK-Skills hooks below need manual wiring after symlinking.

PreToolUse._comment: CK-Skills: redirects eligible /ship substeps to Codex CLI
CK-Skills: soft gate — injects research checklist before edits
